_comment: YouTube Short — Article 1: Your 50+ Workforce Is Your Biggest Untapped Asset
_instructions: Record a 50-second VERTICAL (1080x1920) clean HeyGen video of Brian reading the script. No text overlays. Export as MP4.

youtube.title: Your 50+ workers are NOT the problem. The training is.
youtube.description:
Every organization says they can't find good people. Meanwhile, 38 million experienced workers are sitting right in front of them.

52.3 percent of U.S. businesses are owned by people 55+. They control $76 trillion in wealth. And most organizations are sending them to AI workshops designed for 25-year-olds.

50+TechBridge: AI training built for adults 50+. 3X the industry completion rate.

Learn more: https://learnmoretechnologies.com/workforce/
youtube.tags: shorts, workforce development, AI training, adults 50+, agetech, digital inclusion, 50+ TechBridge, experienced workers, Brian McKinney
